---
title: "Quarto Presentations"
subtitle: "Create beautiful interactive slide decks with Reveal.js"
format:
  revealjs: 
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: 
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
jupyter: python3
editor: visual
resources:
  - demo.pdf
---

## Introduction

Welcome to an integrated Quarto talk using **Python** and **R**.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Python Example

```{python}
import pandas as pd 
df = pd.DataFrame({"x": range(5), "y": range(5)}) 
df
```

{{< include ../../shared-assets/disclaimer.qmd >}}
